subHeadline: Deep, permanent reference hubs for the engines and systems Jaguar owners research most — not blog posts, not one-off articles. Every guide is built on real UK enquiry data and Jaguar-specific expertise.

centres.title: AJ-V8 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Every displacement and state of tune, 4.2 to 5.0 SC — the complete AJ-V8/AJ133 ownership guide.

centres.title: AJD-V6 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The 2.7 and 3.0 TDV6 diesel's full ownership profile — the same engine family as Land Rover's 276DT/306DT.

centres.title: Ingenium Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Petrol vs diesel reliability, pre- and post-2019 changes, and what to look for when buying.

centres.title: AJ126 V6 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The supercharged 3.0 V6's full reliability record, cooling-system upgrades, and running costs.

centres.title: V12 Heritage Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The legendary 5.3/6.0 HE V12 — ownership, rebuilds, and what collectors need to know.

centres.title: Air Suspension Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Common faults, compressor failure, replacement costs, and how to diagnose air-suspension issues.

centres.title: ZF Gearbox Problems
centres.description: The 8-speed automatic's known issues across the JLR range — mechatronic, torque converter, and more.

centres.title: XK Legacy Engine Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The straight-six that powered every Jaguar saloon from the Mark 2 to the XJS — heritage ownership guide.

footer.title: 100% Data-Verified. Built for Jaguar Owners.
footer.text: Every knowledge centre is built on real UK enquiry data and Jaguar-specific expertise.
